race.comment: BRIMARVI ROSEMARIE (4) just missed fresh in a strong form race and then was able to go one better last time when driving up the inside to get the bob. Fitter third-up and can make it two on the bounce. HALLIWELL (1) was good fresh when chasing Omaha Dawn into third when resuming in the slop last month. Less effective second-up when getting too far back but she's since gone back to the jumpouts. Gets an important 3kg claim under the big weight and can bounce back sharply third-up. BOHEMIAN ANGEL (3) returns and makes her stable debut for the Stokes camp. Has always shown promise without going on with it. Jumped out well in readiness and is worth good thought.
